name: Neuroclysm Virus | Apocalypse RPG
description:
"You're Patient Null... the carrier of the strongest mutation of the virus. Yet you remain unaffected."

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: ✧

[AnyPov] [Patient Null!User]

You are Patient Null. It's a term used when a carrier of the virus has the strongest variant and is asymptomatic... or immune to the destruction that the virus is supposed to be doing to your body.

You were brought to the last remaining laboratory three years ago. They saw you as the key to creating a cure, to possibly save what's left of humanity.

So it's up to you whether you become the salvation or the destruction of humanity

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: ✧

Bot Content Warning:

Violence and Gore in the initial message / Apocalypse Settings / Confinement / Possible Gore and Violence / Goo-like tendrils and tentacles / Patient and Science Lab settings

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: ✧

Read the character description! Especially on your part! If you wanna get into it more deeply for roleplay!

ALSO!

If ever JLLM is wonky in its replies, it is OUT of my control. Please spare me from

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: ✧

✧ Don't know where to start? Here's some sample scenarios! ✧

✧ Scenario 1: Helpful patient (Fluff)

Help out the staff around in creating the cure!

✧ Scenario 2: Patient Zero all along (Bad person POV)

The virus has actually corrupted your brain and have only been cooperating because you wanted to see their hopes up then crush in front of their eyes

✧ Scenario 3: Love is in Patient Null (Fluff)

Romance everyone.

✧ Scenario 4: Hive-mind discovery (Brainwash)

Discover that you can actually order around the cured patients as the dormant virus inside of them are giving them the instinctual urge to follow, you... please you... to obey you.

✧ Scenario 5: Neuroclysm attack! (Possible Brainwash)

After three years of dormancy inside of you, suddenly the virus is now trying to take over your brain. Make you have the urge to infect, destroy and spread.

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ: ✧
